title: Corelib root resolution, ABI snapshot, and format golden in CI

source.subject: fix(ci): corelib root resolution, ABI snapshot, format golden

body:
## Outcome

Corelib root resolution, ABI snapshot, format golden.

## Context

- Workstream **ci-release** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **api.json primary contract** (`v02-api-json-contract`).
- Corelib sources live in the **corelib** submodule; package identity is **corelib** with workspace publish to pckg.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`010981f`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/010981f) — fix(ci): corelib root resolution, ABI snapshot, format golden
